Could you please take some time to review and troubleshoot these specific issues? Other than that, the rest of the products appear to have been successfully updated on Feb 6, 2026.

Thank you!

@_user_1 Please use this sample as a reference of the recommendation sections of the new PDP.

The first recommendation would be all other products within the SAME brand to complete the routine.

The second recommendation would be same product type across ALL brands

The third recommendation would be build-in shopify AI recommendation that includes best seller or most viewed products.
